purpose: Declare a governance boundary for StegVerse organization-index review without creating authority inheritance.

claims.claim: This artifact is independently discoverable through the StegVerse organization index.
This artifact may be compared with adjacent governance artifacts for boundary review.

non_claims: This artifact does not claim GLM compatibility.
This artifact does not claim GLM adoption.
This artifact does not claim interoperability with GLM.
This artifact does not inherit authority from GLM.
This artifact does not grant authority to GLM.
This artifact does not authorize runtime execution in any external system.

five_question_model.what_is_not_declared: GLM compatibility, interoperability, or inherited authority.
five_question_model.what_can_be_reviewed: The boundary, claims, non-claims, and authority scope.
five_question_model.what_must_not_be_inferred: That adjacent discovery creates shared authority or operational compatibility.
